steps.title: Locate the critics' concern
steps.content: The passage states the source of skepticism: although the trees were cultivated for Bosco Verticale, it is too early to tell whether they can thrive in that unusual setting. The concern is whether the building can sustain its vegetation.

steps.title: Exclude absent objections
steps.content: Choice A discusses adapting the design outside Milan, which the passage does not mention. Choice B invents a problem with plant variety. Choice C invents a concern about construction damage. The answer is D.
